deals.title: One of the best ways to spend a sunset in Vienna is completely free
deals.description: One of the best ways to spend a sunset in Vienna is completely free. Wander along the Donaukanal, where you never know what you’ll stumble upon. There are plenty of canal-side bars where you can grab a drink and soak up the atmosphere. You can also pick up a few snacks and drinks from the grocery store, find a spot along the water’s edge, and watch the city slow down as the sun sets. Looking for more local spots like this?
